summary: Patch pass applied for the Phase 5 review blockers. The plan now adds a RED-first AST-backed test inventory, broadens Category B/C triage beyond exact grep shapes, moves FNR2 before final verification with equality and membership detection, removes the nonexistent noop_sink recommendation, hardens the destructive audit-store runbook with live path resolution and stale/current guards, aligns final gates with CI/pre-commit scopes, and adds dirty-tree/staged-manifest/remote-check requirements. Rerun plan-review before executing Phase 5.

patched_blockers.title: Test triage misses raw SQL and non-exact RowOutcome comparison shapes
changes: Added Task 5.0a for a tests-only AST inventory covering raw token_outcomes SQL, SQLAlchemy schema reads, arbitrary RowOutcome attribute/comparison/collection/membership uses, and hardcoded old outcome string checks.
Broadened Category B from exact outcome == RowOutcome.X to assertion/comparison-only sites including reversed equality, list/set equality, membership, and old string values.
Changed triage commands to source-only rg patterns that avoid __pycache__ and binary .pyc noise.
Replaced stale count expectations with live-scan count recording.

patched_blockers.title: Task 5.7 is not RED-first and leaves hardcoded-string membership bypasses
changes: Moved the FNR2 work to Task 5.5a before final verification.
Required RED tests before changing forbid_new_row_outcome.py.
Changed FNR2 scope to equality, inequality, in, and not-in comparisons against known RowOutcome value strings.
Updated the ADR-019 symbol inventory requirements so source closeout also detects RowOutcome, TerminalOutcome, and TerminalPath membership checks.

patched_blockers.title: Operator migration doc recommends nonexistent noop_sink
changes: Replaced the noop_sink recommendation with an explicit warning that no built-in no-op sink exists today.
Marked the noop_sink YAML as invalid unless a real plugin is added and tested.
Listed supported operator choices: use a real success sink, add a tested no-op sink feature, or accept/rebaseline ADR-019 semantics.

patched_blockers.title: Destructive audit-store runbook has path, idempotence, and backup-safety hazards
changes: Changed the staging SQLite path to /home/john/elspeth/data/runs/audit.db and added a note to resolve any deploy env landscape_url override before backup/delete.
Added pre-delete guards that require a present DB, abort when completed already exists, and require stale is_terminal before deletion.
Changed backup directory creation to a unique operator-owned directory and removed unsafe redirection into root-owned paths.
Added a Postgres stale/current schema guard before dropdb.

patched_blockers.title: Final verification gates are not CI/pre-commit equivalent
changes: Added pre-commit run --all-files.
Aligned ruff with src/ tests/ scripts/ examples/ and mypy with src/ tests/.
Added coverage threshold, audit-evidence nominal, Tier-1 decoration, and adr019_test_inventory gates.
Required remote GitHub checks to go green after PR creation, including the Python 3.12/3.13 matrix.

patched_blockers.title: Commit and PR steps are unsafe against dirty tree and remote-check timing
changes: Added pre-staging git status and intended-file manifest review.
Added staged diff/stat and staged file manifest review before commit.
Added explicit no-stash guidance and stop conditions for unrelated dirty work.
Added gh pr checks --watch after PR creation.

patched_warnings.title: RowOutcome counts and PR template numbers are stale
changes: Removed stale hardcoded totals from the PR template.
Required live counts from the phase execution scans.

patched_warnings.title: diagnostics.py:181 context claim is stale
changes: Reworded the FNR2 context as a historical string-literal bypass class instead of a current diagnostics.py line claim.

patched_warnings.title: Impacted-test loop omits property/e2e and importlib probing is weak
changes: Changed affected-file validation to pytest --collect-only.
Added tests/property/ and tests/e2e/ to impacted runs.

patched_warnings.title: Task 5.7 appears after the final gate it precedes
changes: Renumbered and moved the FNR2 task to Task 5.5a before final verification.

clean_checks: Patch is documentation-only plus sidecar synchronization.
JSON sidecar must parse with jq after this patch pass.
Phase 5 remains pending review; do not execute until a fresh plan-review pass approves it.
next_actions: Rerun plan-review against the updated Phase 5 plan.
Do not execute Phase 5 until the rerun returns APPROVED or APPROVED_WITH_WARNINGS.
